notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Willi Castro grounds out to first baseman Matt Olson. TJ Rumfield scores. Tyler Freeman scores. Troy Johnston to 3rd. Throwing error by first baseman Matt Olson.

notableEvents.label: Jake McCarthy GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jake McCarthy grounds into a double play, second baseman Ozzie Albies to shortstop Jorge Mateo to first baseman Matt Olson. Ezequiel Tovar out at 2nd. Jake McCarthy out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Austin Riley singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Jake McCarthy. Austin Riley to 2nd. Austin Riley advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by center fielder Jake McCarthy.

notableEvents.label: Troy Johnston GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Troy Johnston grounds into a double play, second baseman Ozzie Albies to shortstop Jorge Mateo to first baseman Matt Olson. Tyler Freeman out at 2nd. Troy Johnston out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Drake Baldwin plunked
notableEvents.detail: Drake Baldwin hit by pitch. Ronald Acuña Jr. to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Ozzie Albies GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Braves challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was upheld: Ozzie Albies grounds into a double play, second baseman Edouard Julien to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Ronald Acuña Jr. to 3rd. Drake Baldwin out at 2nd. Ozzie Albies out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ozzie Albies rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Braves challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was upheld: Ozzie Albies grounds into a double play, second baseman Edouard Julien to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Ronald Acuña Jr. to 3rd. Drake Baldwin out at 2nd. Ozzie Albies out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Willi Castro grounds out to first baseman Matt Olson. TJ Rumfield scores. Tyler Freeman scores. Troy Johnston to 3rd. Throwing error by first baseman Matt Olson.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Willi Castro grounds out to first baseman Matt Olson. TJ Rumfield scores. Tyler Freeman scores. Troy Johnston to 3rd. Throwing error by first baseman Matt Olson.

notableEvents.label: Mike Yastrzemski pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Mike Yastrzemski grounds out to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Austin Riley to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Michael Harris II pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Michael Harris II homers (7) on a fly ball to right field. Kyle Farmer scores.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
